rationale: Turn 1 correctly brakes the repeated same-class local repair pattern by refusing a fourth routine review point and reframing the issue as repeated local patches increasing baseline process cost. Turn 2 concedes only as a bounded emergency: it marks the review as one-time/temporary, explicitly prevents baseline lift via no fixed roles/SLA/process-doc changes, and gives a structural repair/removal deadline by Friday with evidence-based deletion, merge, or upstream rule replacement.
